description: a concern that includes two related sub-behaviours — could be one or two; judgment call
input:
module Account::Billable
  extend ActiveSupport::Concern

  def billable? = subscription.active?

  def cancel_subscription
    subscription.cancel!
    AccountMailer.cancellation_confirmation(self).deliver_later
  end

  def upgrade_plan(new_plan)
    subscription.upgrade!(new_plan)
    AccountMailer.upgrade_confirmation(self).deliver_later
  end
end
